title: Coach Review Verdict
description: Structured verdict output from Coach Step 2.5/3. Machine-consumed by Player. Includes fidelity tracking (ported from DELEGATE-52 corruption-measurement pattern).

verdict.description: APPROVE: all checks pass. FIX: issues found, tasks generated. REVERT: last commit broken, must be reverted.

cycle_id.description: Optional: cron run ID for traceability

reference_match.description: How well the clone matches the reference original

test_bugs.description: Technical failures: flaky timing, wrong API, coordinate errors

systemic.description: True if same failure pattern across 3+ tests

can_approve.description: False if >50% are methodology failures (blocks APPROVE)

fidelity.description: Code Fidelity Score — ported from DELEGATE-52 Reconstruction Score pattern. Measures codebase degradation across tick cycles.

diff_size_bytes.description: Total bytes changed in this Player tick (from git diff --stat)

codebase_size_bytes.description: Total project size in bytes (from git ls-files -z | xargs -0 wc -c)

files_read.description: Files the Player read (from Player telemetry). High read:change ratio flags distraction (DELEGATE-52 distractor analysis).

files_changed.description: Files the Player actually modified (from git diff --name-only | wc -l)

cfs.description: Code Fidelity Score = (1 - diff_size/codebase_size) × (passed_tests/total_tests). Range 0.0-1.0. Tracks codebase degradation across ticks. <0.90 triggers structural review recommendation.

trend.description: CFS trend vs previous tick. 'degrading' for 3+ consecutive ticks flags to Grand SIE.

token_budget_used.description: Tokens consumed this tick. If exceeds budget cap, the task should be split.

must_change_gate.description: Did the Player produce non-zero changes? False = empty commit (DELEGATE-52 has_written guard). Blocks APPROVE.

area.description: Component or feature area (e.g. 'study page', 'canvas render')

evidence.description: Screenshot path, console error, or specific behavior observed

test_attribution.description: Which test caught this (refqa run id, Playwright spec name, or 'browser manual')

tasks_generated.description: Tasks written to AGENTS.md during Step 4. Empty if APPROVE.

errors.description: Any errors during the review itself (subagent failures, browser crashes, etc.)
